	Call 46 4e 00 00 // ProcessType[error]
	Return 
// 0x524e: ProcessType[string]
	ProcessString b3 00 00 00 
	Return 
// 0x5254: ProcessType[table<bool,int>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 54 4e 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<bool,int>]
	Return 
// 0x525f: ProcessType[table<int,int>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 60 4e 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<int,int>]
	Return 
// 0x526a: ProcessType[table<int,main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 6c 4e 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<int,main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Return 
// 0x5275: ProcessType[table<int,string>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 78 4e 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<int,string>]
	Return 
// 0x5280: ProcessType[table<string,*main.indexMemberStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 84 4e 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,*main.indexMemberStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x528b: ProcessType[table<string,int>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 90 4e 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,int>]
	Return 
// 0x5296: ProcessType[table<string,main.bigStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 9c 4e 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.bigStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x52a1: ProcessType[table<string,main.indexMemberStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call a8 4e 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.indexMemberStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x52ac: ProcessType[table<string,main.largeValueStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call b4 4e 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.largeValueStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x52b7: ProcessType[table<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call c0 4e 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Return 
// 0x52c2: ProcessType[time.fileSizeError]
	ProcessString 1f 01 00 00 
	Return
